texto: Hatred is a passion requiring one hundred times the energy of love. Keep it for a cause not an individual. Keep it for intolerance injustice stupidity. For hatred is the strength of the sensitive. Its power and its greatness depend on the selflessness of its use.
explicacao: Citação de Olive Moore sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Hatred is a passion requiring one hundred times the energy of love. Keep it for a cause not an in…” articula reflexao, forgiveness, hatred em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
